subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-03-15
subcodes.first_line: There are three ancient Bibles. 1st the Jewish Bible. 2nd the Sanhedrin Bible which was translated by the seventy wisest Rabbis into Greek at the time of Ptolemy. 3rd the Samaritan Bible.
subcodes.subjects: @grammatical and other discrepancies in the Sacred Writings, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
